data.body:
Using CPS data (1988–2019), we document that the vast majority of families (~77%) in the U.S. already are "under the same umbrella".
AND that Family-level insurance uniformity fell by ~10 percentage points over 30 years (for families <400% FPL).
Even as overall coverage expanded.
data.author: did:plc:gmiekknm5h735sldbylfucip

data.body: As you can see from this graph, in the 90s we see a lot of fragmentation of medicaid eligibility for kids, that gets reduced in the 2000s with the introduction of SCHIP.

Ohio State landed the commitment of Spanish forward Adriana Díaz, out of Movistar Estudiantes Madrid. 

The 6-foot-1 post can play physically inside and shoot from three-point range. 

Díaz is the second commitment in the 2026 class, alongside guard Atlee Vanesko.
